title: Peachy Madness
description: Peachy Madness adds peaches, cherry food items, blocks, and introduces uranium and vanadium ores with new tools and armor to Minecraft.
body:
# 🍑 Peachy Madness

![Peachy Madness Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a95e5acec4e8bafa4cf4c8fc9eb84a9c34501b0f.jpeg)

## 🌟 What's Inside?

- **Peach Trees:** New peach trees that drop peaches
- **Cherry Trees:** Existing cherry trees now drop cherries
- **Peach Wood:** Complete set of peach wood blocks (planks, stairs, slabs, etc.)
- **Fruity Treats:** Peach and cherry-based food items, including golden variants
- **Jam-packed:** Jam bottles and blocks for your building needs
- **New Ores:** 
  - Uranium
  - Vanadium
- **New Gear:** Craft tools and armor from vanadium

## 🌳 World Generation

- Peach trees naturally spawn alongside vanilla trees in various biomes
- Uranium ore generates across all dimensions
- Vanadium ore adds a new mining challenge to the overworld

## 📸 See It In Action

Check out the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/peachy-madness/gallery) for a visual showcase of Peachy Madness!

## 🚀 Coming Soon

More peachy updates are in the works. Stay tuned!

---

Peachy Madness adds a splash of fruity fun and new resources to your Minecraft world. Enjoy the sweet life! 🍑🍒
